title: Vanilla Mending
description: Mend & further update the new vanilla textures of Minecraft!
body: --- [Texture Update](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Texture_Update) has changed most of the textures in Minecraft, with some textures still remaining old and outdated though. Despite that Mojang updated many of these textures in the subsquent versions and the overall look is now much better, it's even still an issue in the latest release (the most significant one - overworld sign items). This pack aims to updating all the textures and make them consistent with each other, including Paintings and GUI. Also, this pack will fix some issues in vanilla texture, such as the bottom of the rods of Blaze ([MC-144327](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-144327)). ![Wood-related things](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6U76tXst/images/5dbd1902fdfd7d9e1ca788dc2b35956906d4b1a5.png) ![Items in Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6U76tXst/images/14ca488a479ccc872698dfb1e2dd6e9e7f6c8aae.png) ![Non-mob entities](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6U76tXst/images/6bbb2f47b5cf81aede93167f2a8e25f28c8d79f9.png) This pack is also available on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/vanilla-mending).
